title: My Top REIT Picks For 2023
text: This is the first time in over a decade that my top picks lost money. I'm always happy to show you the proof of my stock-market wins. But I have to be just as honest about the losses.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Extra Space Storage (EXR) Stock for Now?
text: The rising demand for self-storage spaces, accretive buyouts and a solid balance sheet are likely to aid Extra Space Storage (EXR). Stiff competition and a development boom in many markets are woes.

title: It's Over: The REIT Market Is Collapsing (Debunked)
text: REITs are dropping more day after day due to rising interest rates. Investors fear that the profitability and asset values will collapse.
